name: Meng Ya

skills.name: Fiery Temper
skills.description: Cooldown is reduced when Attack Speed is increased. Gains Anger when Basic Attack and Skill 1 hit targets. At max Anger, becomes Excited, enhancing all skills. While Excited, surplus Anger restores Health.

skills.name: Awesome Barrage
skills.description: Uses the Apocalyptor to strafe continuously and deal damage. '''Excited:''' Bullets have a piercing effect, dealing half damage to subsequent enemies.

skills.name: Heavy Shot
skills.description: Shoots a heavy round in the target direction, inflicting damage and slow. Upon hitting an obstacle or reaching its max range, it will split into splinters that deal damage. '''Excited:''' Increases the number of splinters.

skills.name: Missile Mayhem
skills.description: Scans the vicinity and fires missiles at enemies within range who are attacked by teammates, dealing damage. '''Excited:''' Reduces interval between missiles.

tips: Meng Ya (Marksman): Tier B on international ranked — 53.61% WR.
Build core: Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, Shadow Ripper.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 53.61%, pick 0.42%, ban 0.01%, popularity tier B.
Counters Mai Shiranui, Pei, Diaochan · Weak into Liu Bang.

faqs.question: Is Meng Ya good in current season?
faqs.answer: Meng Ya is Tier B Marksman with 53.61% win rate, 0.42% pick rate, and 0.01% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Meng Ya build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, Shadow Ripper, Doomsday, Sunchaser, Daybreaker's Virtue. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Meng Ya?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Meng Ya: Liu Bang. Meng Ya is strong into Mai Shiranui, Pei, Diaochan.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Pei, Diaochan. Countered by: Liu Bang.
